inputs.label: Chainring Teeth
inputs.businessContext: Number of teeth on the front chainring.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of teeth on the front chainring.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Zähne auf dem vorderen Kettenblatt.

inputs.label: Cassette Teeth
inputs.businessContext: Number of teeth on the selected rear sprocket.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of teeth on the selected rear sprocket.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Zähne auf dem ausgewählten hinteren Ritzel.

inputs.label: Wheel Diameter (with tire)
inputs.businessContext: Outer diameter of the wheel including tire, in millimeters. Typical 700c road bike is ~700mm.

businessContext_i18n.en: Outer diameter of the wheel including tire, in millimeters. Typical 700c road bike is ~700mm.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Lastik dahil tekerleğin dış çapı, milimetre cinsinden. Tipik 700c yol bisikleti ~700mm'dir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Außendurchmesser des Rades inklusive Reifen in Millimetern. Typisches 700c Rennrad ~700 mm.

inputs.label: Cadence
inputs.businessContext: Pedaling cadence in revolutions per minute.

businessContext_i18n.en: Pedaling cadence in revolutions per minute.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dakikadaki pedal devri cinsinden pedal çevirme kadansı.
